original_definition.skill_description: Guidelines for building Java base applications Triggers on: **/*.java

actions.name: If yes, document a recommended static-analysis setup.
actions.description: If yes, document a recommended static-analysis setup.

actions.name: Prefer SonarQube/SonarCloud (SonarLint in IDE + `sonar-scann
actions.description: Prefer SonarQube/SonarCloud (SonarLint in IDE + `sonar-scanner` in CI).

actions.name: Store the scanner token in CI secrets.
actions.description: Store the scanner token in CI secrets.

actions.name: Provide a sample CI job that runs the scanner.
actions.description: Provide a sample CI job that runs the scanner.

actions.name: If the team declines Sonar, note this in the project README
actions.description: If the team declines Sonar, note this in the project README and continue.

actions.name: 3. Confirm SonarLint is installed and configured.
actions.description: 3. Confirm SonarLint is installed and configured.

actions.name: If the user declines static analysis tools or wants to proce
actions.description: If the user declines static analysis tools or wants to proceed without them, continue with implementing the Best practices, bug patterns and code smel

actions.name: Focus on readability, maintainability, and performance when
actions.description: Focus on readability, maintainability, and performance when refactoring identified issues.

actions.name: Parameter count — Keep method parameter lists short. If a me
actions.description: Parameter count — Keep method parameter lists short. If a method needs many params, consider grouping into a value object or using the builder pattern

actions.name: Method size — Keep methods focused and small. Extract helper
actions.description: Method size — Keep methods focused and small. Extract helper methods to improve readability and testability.

actions.name: Cognitive complexity — Reduce nested conditionals and heavy
actions.description: Cognitive complexity — Reduce nested conditionals and heavy branching by extracting methods, using polymorphism, or applying the Strategy pattern.

actions.name: Duplicated literals — Extract repeated strings and numbers i
actions.description: Duplicated literals — Extract repeated strings and numbers into named constants or enums to reduce errors and ease changes.

actions.name: Dead code — Remove unused variables and assignments. They co
actions.description: Dead code — Remove unused variables and assignments. They confuse readers and can hide bugs.

actions.name: If the project uses Maven, run `mvn clean install`.
actions.description: If the project uses Maven, run `mvn clean install`.
